Skip to footer

Airtable home or view your bases

Platform & Products

Unlock the power of a next-gen app-building platform

Download

The Airtable Platform
Propel your business with a next-gen app-building platform. See data move in real-time and securely transform your work with AI.
Explore the platform
Solutions
Solutions
Teams
Product
See what's happening across your portfolio, and ship better products.
Marketing
Plan smarter campaigns and scale impact with unifed marketing workflows.
Project Management
Strategic project management built for outcomes, not just to-do lists.
Operations
Run operations in one platform that connects workflows, data, and tools.

Surface sales opportunities, spot churn risk early, and close more deals faster.

All your teams, all their workflows—connected in one workspace
Build AI-powered workflows that unify data, maximize collaboration, and set your teams up for long-term success. No code required.
Get started for free
Book demo
Sorry, your browser doesn’t support embedded videos.
Trusted by 500,000 leading teams
Sophisticated workflows in minutes, not months
01 AI app building
02 Agents at Scale
03 Meet Omni
04 Enterprise capabilities
Production apps at prototype speed
Streamline your team’s critical data through conversational building. Generate apps with Airtable’s best-in-class no-code components—no technical expertise required.
Learn more
Sorry, your browser doesn’t support embedded videos.
Don’t just ask AI. Deploy it.
Embed intelligence into every workflow—Airtable agents think dynamically across thousands of records and orchestrate actions across your entire operation.
Learn more
Say hello to Omni
Use it to build any enterprise-grade applications with your data. The possibilities are endless.
Learn more
The power of AI with the industrial-grade platform your business demands
Scalable infrastructure
HyperDB with record limits in the hundreds of millions
Scale workflows to tens of thousands of users
Use AI models from leading providers  (OpenAI, Gemini, Llama, Anthropic, and more)
Flexible administration
Admin roles, robust permissions, fine-grained RBAC
Fine-grained controls to enable AI
Programmatic provisioning and de-provisioning
IDP synced groups
Security and compliance
ISO, HIPAA, SOC 2
No customer data retained or used to train AI models
Models run fully in Airtable’s AWS environment
EKM, data loss prevention, audit logs, e-discovery
European and Australian data residency support
The path to 10x every person in your organization
Use cases and templates to activate AI in your workflows
See AI plays
Read this brief and generate 10 campaign ideas for our summer launch.
Explore AI Plays
Gather intel on all event invitees to help me personalize outreach.
Explore AI Plays
What are customers saying about our competitors and where are our biggest opportunities?
Explore AI Plays
Run language translation on 500 assets and check for local regulation requirements.
Explore AI Plays
Resources to inspire
Builders & Breakthroughs
Hear from top product leaders as they share the pivotal insights and decisions behind building great products—hosted by Airtable CEO Howie Liu.
The 2026 AI guide for marketers
Learn how to prep your marketing organization for AI integration and layer Airtable across your most critical marketing workflows.
In action: Airtable ProductCentral
See how Airtable ProductCentral delivers a complete view of product investments at every altitude, infusing AI at each step of the product development process.
Sorry, your browser doesn't support embedded videos.
“Airtable makes it easy to deliver AI insights to every team quickly and without complex builds.”
Angela Yanes
Director of Product Operations, eBay
Explore all customer stories
Start building with Airtable
Teams at over 500,000 forward-thinking organizations use Airtable every day. Join them.

Have additional questions?
Billing / pricing
Billing FAQ
Special plans for
Nonprofits
or
Education
Enterprise plans
Contact Sales
Frequently asked questions
How does Airtable's pricing work?
Airtable plans are charged per seat. If you are on Airtable’s Free plan, all users are free. If you are on a Team or Business plan, you will be charged for all users who have edit permissions for at least one base in the workspace. No charges will apply on a Team or Business plan for read-only collaborators, form submissions, or share links. Charges are prorated: users with edit permissions added partway through the month will only be charged for the days after they were added.
How does Airtable's Business and Enterprise Scale pricing work?
Airtable has two plans geared towards large company usage of Airtable: Business and Enterprise Scale. You can purchase Business either through the plan upgrades page in your workspace settings tab, or by contacting our sales team. To purchase Enterprise Scale, please contact sales. On either plan, you will be charged for all users with edit permissions for at least one base in your organization. As part of the Enterprise Scale plan, an organization has the ability to create unlimited org units, workspaces and bases within their organization. Charges are prorated: collaborators with edit permissions added partway through the billing cycle will only be charged for the months after they were added. For more information on our Business and Enterprise Scale plans,
contact sales
.
Is Airtable free to use?
Airtable has multiple packages to help teams of all sizes orchestrate their work. Our Free plan is available to teams for no charge and provides the key building blocks to help you build applications. The Free plan is formulated for individual users, very small teams, or those with lightweight needs. Our paid plans offer additional power and scale for teams, departments, and large enterprises.
How much does Airtable cost?
Our Free plan is available at no cost for users just getting started. For teams who like the features of our Free plan but need more capacity, our Team plan is available for $20/user/month when bi

integrations.title: Airtable Integrations - Connect Your Apps with Airtable
integrations.text:
Airtable Integrations - Connect Your Apps with Airtable
Skip to main content
Skip to footer
Bring your Airtable data into Claude.
Try it now
Airtable home or view your bases
Platform
Platform
Platform & Products
Airtable Platform
Unlock the power of a next-gen app-building platform
AI App Building
NEW
Enable teams to build custom business apps—no code needed
AI Agents
NEW
Deploy thousands of agents inside your apps
Portals
Collaborate seamlessly with guest users outside your organization
Scale
Build apps on top of massive data sets with 100M records
Platform Features
Learn about automations, interfaces, and more
Back
Features
Automations
Achieve more in less time via automations
Databases
Use relational databases to connect data from apps, workflows, and tools
Interfaces
Create custom interfaces from your data
Reporting
Measure, analyze, and share insights
Views
Tailor data visualizations to your teams’ needs
Governance and Security
Centrally manage security, permissions and data protection
Airtable AI
Embed AI throughout end-to-end workflows
What's New
See Airtable's latest product updates
Tools

The Airtable Platform
Propel your business with a next-gen app-building platform. See data move in real-time and securely transform your work with AI.
Explore the platform

Solutions
Teams
Product
See what's happening across your portfolio, and ship better products.
Marketing
Plan smarter campaigns and scale impact with unifed marketing workflows.
Project Management
Strategic project management built for outcomes, not just to-do lists.
Operations
Run operations in one platform that connects workflows, data, and tools.
Sales
Surface sales opportunities, spot churn risk early, and close more deals faster.
Design & Creative
Unify design workflows, stay on-brand, and innovate creative quickly.
Human Resources
Manage and streamline processes from hire to retire
Finance
Streamline requests, manage budgets, and automate reporting
Industries
Media & Entertainment
Run content production, digital assets, and crew operations in one place
Retail
Power critical retail workflows from product planning to final purchase
CPG Manufacturing
Keep track of your products, supply chain, and quality assurance
Education
Manage student services, planning, and grants more efficiently
Technology
Unite your entire SaaS org to drive faster GTM execution and greater impact.
Agency & Professional Services
Streamline coordination, protect margins, and deliver better client outcomes.
Customer Story

How Code and Theory consolidated tooling and saved more than 10,000 hours with Airtable.

hits.title: Grist – Open core alternative to Airtable and Google Sheets
Show HN: NocoDB – Open-Source Airtable Alternative
Microsoft announces Lists, a new Airtable-like app
Show HN: Airtable, a real-time spreadsheet-database hybrid
Show HN: DataSheetGrid, an Airtable-like React component

analysis.name: Airtable
analysis.tagline: Build Enterprise-ready AI Workflows, Apps & Agents
analysis.value_proposition: A no-code app-building platform that unifies relational databases, AI agents, and workflow automation for enterprise teams.
analysis.ideal_customer: Mid-to-large organizations needing connected cross-functional workflows without engineering overhead — especially product, marketing, and operations teams

features.name: ai app building
features.description: Conversational, no-code app generation using Airtable's component library
features.evidence_quote: Enable teams to build custom business apps—no code needed

features.name: ai agents
features.description: Deploy autonomous agents that act across thousands of records and orchestrate multi-step operations
features.evidence_quote: Deploy thousands of agents inside your apps

features.name: airtable ai (inline ai)
features.description: AI embedded throughout workflows — summarize, classify, generate, and transform field data

features.name: ai credits
features.description: Per-seat monthly AI credit allotment controlling AI feature usage; scales by tier
features.evidence_quote: 500 AI credits per editor each month... 15,000 AI credits per paid user each month

features.name: ai admin controls
features.description: Centralized controls for governing AI feature access and usage across the organization

features.name: multi-model ai support
features.description: Use AI models from OpenAI, Gemini, Llama, Anthropic, and other providers
features.evidence_quote: Use AI models from leading providers (OpenAI, Gemini, Llama, Anthropic, and more)

features.name: automations
features.description: Trigger-based workflow automation with configurable run limits per tier
features.evidence_quote: 100 automation runs... 25,000 automation runs... 500,000 automation runs

features.name: relational databases
features.description: Linked-record relational data model connecting tables within and across bases
features.evidence_quote: Use relational databases to connect data from apps, workflows, and tools

features.name: interface designer
features.description: Drag-and-drop builder for creating custom UIs on top of Airtable data

features.name: reporting
features.description: Built-in dashboards to measure, analyze, and share data insights

features.name: views
features.description: Multiple data visualization modes including grid, gallery, kanban, and more
features.evidence_quote: Tailor data visualizations to your teams' needs

features.name: gantt view
features.description: Gantt chart view for timeline-based project planning

features.name: timeline view
features.description: Timeline visualization for scheduling and dependency tracking

features.name: calendar view
features.description: Calendar-style data visualization with expanded formatting options
features.evidence_quote: Expanded color, formatting, and calendar options

features.name: roadmap view
features.description: Product roadmap visualization with executive summary cards
features.evidence_quote: Roadmap view and Exec Summary cards

features.name: exec summary cards
features.description: High-level executive summary card views layered onto roadmap data
features.evidence_quote: Roadmap view and Exec Summary cards

features.name: portals
features.description: Branded external collaboration portals for guest users outside the organization
features.evidence_quote: Collaborate seamlessly with guest users outside your organization

features.name: forms
features.description: Shareable data-entry forms that feed records directly into bases
features.evidence_quote: Building and sharing forms in Airtable

features.name: formula fields
features.description: Calculated fields using Airtable's formula language for derived data

features.name: date dependencies
features.description: Linked date fields that shift dependent dates automatically

features.name: markdown support
features.description: Rich text formatting using Markdown in text and long-text fields

features.name: extensions
features.description: Installable extensions (charts, maps, page designer, org charts, scripting) from the marketplace

features.name: scripting extension
features.description: JavaScript scripting environment for custom automations and data transformations

features.name: custom extensions
features.description: Developer-built real-time interactive extensions via the Extensions SDK

features.name: standard sync integrations
features.description: One-way data sync from third-party sources into Airtable bases

features.name: two-way sync
features.description: Bidirectional data sync between Airtable and connected external sources

features.name: premium sync integrations
features.description: Advanced sync connectors including Salesforce, Jira, and other premium sources

features.name: enterprise scale integrations
features.description: Highest-tier sync connectors including Databricks, Snowflake, and enterprise data warehouses

features.name: verified data
features.description: Data validation layer ensuring records meet defined quality criteria

features.name: admin panel
features.description: Centralized admin console for managing users, permissions, and workspace settings

features.name: sso
features.description: SAML-based single sign-on for enterprise identity provider integration

features.name: idp synced groups
features.description: Automatic group membership sync from identity providers (Okta, Azure AD, etc.)

features.name: rbac
features.description: Fine-grained role-based access control at workspace, base, and field levels
features.evidence_quote: Admin roles, robust permissions, fine-grained RBAC

features.name: programmatic provisioning
features.description: API-driven user provisioning and de-provisioning (SCIM)

features.name: app sandbox
features.description: Isolated testing environment for building and validating apps before deployment

features.name: hyperdb
features.description: High-scale database backend supporting hundreds of millions of records per base

features.name: enterprise hub
features.description: Centralized enterprise management console for multi-workspace governance

features.name: app library
features.description: Curated library of approved enterprise apps for organizational distribution

features.name: enterprise api
features.description: Extended API surface for programmatic enterprise management operations

features.name: audit logs
features.description: Immutable logs of user actions for security and compliance review
features.evidence_quote: EKM, data loss prevention, audit logs, e-discovery

features.name: e-discovery
features.description: Data discovery and export capabilities for legal and compliance requests
features.evidence_quote: EKM, data loss prevention, audit logs, e-discovery

features.name: data loss prevention
features.description: DLP controls to prevent unauthorized sharing or exfiltration of sensitive data
features.evidence_quote: EKM, data loss prevention, audit logs, e-discovery

features.name: ekm (enterprise key management)
features.description: Customer-managed encryption keys for data at rest
features.evidence_quote: EKM, data loss prevention, audit logs, e-discovery

features.name: data residency
features.description: Choose data storage region; European and Australian residency supported
features.evidence_quote: European and Australian data residency support

features.name: hipaa compliance
features.description: HIPAA-eligible configuration for healthcare data handling

features.name: soc 2 certification
features.description: SOC 2 Type II certified security controls

features.name: iso certification
features.description: ISO 27001 (and related) information security certification

features.name: no ai training on customer data
features.description: Customer data is not retained or used to train AI models
features.evidence_quote: No customer data retained or used to train AI models

features.name: personal access tokens
features.description: Token-based API authentication for developer integrations

features.name: rest api
features.description: Public REST API for programmatic base and record management

features.name: mobile app
features.description: Native iOS and Android apps for on-the-go access
features.evidence_quote: Download on the App Store / Get it on Google Play

features.name: desktop app
features.description: Dedicated desktop application for Mac and Windows
features.evidence_quote: Get the Airtable app for desktop and mobile

features.name: attachment storage
features.description: Per-base file attachment storage with limits scaling by tier
features.evidence_quote: 1 GB of attachments per base... 1,000 GB of attachments per base

features.name: templates
features.description: Pre-built base templates for common use cases (project management, content calendar, etc.)
features.evidence_quote: Content Calendar, Product Roadmap, Inventory Tracking, Marketing Campaign Planner

features.name: airtable marketplace
features.description: Ecosystem marketplace for extensions, integrations, and partner services

features.name: airtable academy
features.description: Self-serve learning and certification platform for Airtable users

features.name: developer community
features.description: Developer forum for sharing extensions, scripts, and API solutions
features.evidence_quote: Dev Community — Share ideas and find solutions from peers

features.name: databricks integration
features.description: Sync lakehouse data from Databricks; schedule syncs and write custom SQL
features.evidence_quote: Connect Airtable to Databricks to operationalize your lakehouse data. Schedule syncs, write custom SQL

features.name: snowflake integration
features.description: Data warehouse sync between Airtable and Snowflake

features.name: claude integration
features.description: Bring Airtable data into Claude for AI-assisted analysis
features.evidence_quote: Bring data from Airtable into Claude

features.name: chatgpt integration
features.description: Bring Airtable data into ChatGPT for AI-assisted workflows
features.evidence_quote: Bring data from Airtable into ChatGPT

features.name: omni (app builder)
features.description: Enterprise-grade application builder on top of Airtable data with unlimited use cases
features.evidence_quote: Say hello to Omni — Use it to build any enterprise-grade applications with your data.

features.name: extension and integration management
features.description: Centralized admin controls for managing approved extensions and integrations org-wide

differentiators: AI agents that orchestrate actions across thousands of records autonomously
No-code app building with enterprise-grade components via conversational interface
HyperDB supporting record limits in the hundreds of millions
AI models run fully in Airtable's AWS environment — no customer data used for training
Unified platform connecting workflows, data, interfaces, and AI in one workspace
Scale workflows to tens of thousands of users on a single platform
Omni: enterprise-grade application builder on top of structured business data

recent_ships.what: AI App Building — conversational no-code app generation (marked NEW on landing)
recent_ships.source: AI App Building NEW — Enable teams to build custom business apps—no code needed

recent_ships.what: AI Agents — deploy thousands of agents inside apps to orchestrate cross-record operations
recent_ships.source: AI Agents NEW — Deploy thousands of agents inside your apps
Say hello to Omni — Use it to build any enterprise-grade applications with your data.
Portals: Starting from $120 for 15 guests/month (Team tier add-on)

recent_ships.what: Claude integration — bring Airtable data into Claude
recent_ships.source: Bring your Airtable data into Claude. Try it now (site-wide banner)

praised: Flexibility as a spreadsheet-database hybrid (HN: 'Show HN: Airtable, a real-time spreadsheet-database hybrid' — 361↑)
Strong enough adoption to spawn multiple funded OSS alternatives (Baserow, Grist, NocoDB — all 500+ upvotes on HN)
complaints: Pricing/value concerns evidenced by high-engagement HN threads on self-hosted alternatives (Baserow 802↑, Grist 580↑, NocoDB 562↑)
Competitive pressure from Microsoft Lists positioned as a direct replacement (531↑ HN thread)
Lock-in concerns implied by strong OSS alternative demand

free_tier.limits: 5 editors, 1,000 records/base, 1 GB attachments/base, 100 automation runs/month, 500 AI credits/editor/month

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: 5 editors, 1k records/base, 1 GB attachments, 100 automation runs, Interface Designer

tiers.name: Team
tiers.headline_inclusions: 50k records/base, 25k automation runs, 20 GB attachments, Gantt/timeline, extensions, standard sync

tiers.name: Business
tiers.headline_inclusions: 125k records/base, 100k automation runs, SSO, admin panel, two-way sync, app sandbox, roadmap view

tiers.name: Enterprise Scale
tiers.headline_inclusions: 500k records/base, HyperDB, Enterprise Hub, App Library, EKM, audit logs, e-discovery, data residency

pricing.notes: Portals is a paid add-on on Team ($120/mo for 15 guests) and Business ($150/mo for 15 guests). Monthly billing available at $24/seat (Team) and $54/seat (Business). AI credits are per-user-per-month and scale by tier (500 free → 25,000 enterprise). Record and automation limits are per-base, not per-workspace.
